---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
Clear description of what you want to add or improve.

## Use Case
Why do you need this feature? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
How should this feature work? What should the user experience be?

## Alternatives Considered
Are there other ways to solve this? What are the trade-offs?

## Additional Context
Any mockups, diagrams, or other information?
